scripts.dev: sh -c 'dotnet run --project Back-end/VoluntaMais.Api.csproj --urls http://0.0.0.0:5055 & api_pid=$!; trap "kill $api_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; until curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:5055/swagger/index.html >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173'
scripts.preview:full: sh -c 'dotnet run --project Back-end/VoluntaMais.Api.csproj --urls http://0.0.0.0:5055 & api_pid=$!; trap "kill $api_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; until curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:5055/swagger/index.html >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; vite preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173'
